Risk Description: Misconfigured cloud storage exposes confidential customer data.
Mitigation Strategy: Implement CSPM guardrails, automated misconfiguration remediation, and weekly exception review.

Risk Description: Incomplete privileged access controls allow unauthorized admin activity.
Mitigation Strategy: Accelerate PAM rollout, enforce JIT access, and complete quarterly recertifications.

Risk Description: Critical systems have logging gaps reducing forensic visibility.
Mitigation Strategy: Close log source onboarding backlog and deploy ingestion health alerts.

Risk Description: Legacy servers miss security patches beyond SLA windows.
Mitigation Strategy: Implement risk-based patch waves and executive escalation for overdue assets.

Risk Description: Third-party SaaS vendor lacks mature security controls.
Mitigation Strategy: Issue remediation plan with contractual milestones and compensating controls.

Risk Description: Ransomware attack could disrupt ERP operations for multiple days.
Mitigation Strategy: Harden backup isolation, increase recovery testing frequency, and validate restore integrity.

Risk Description: Insider threat detection capability is immature.
Mitigation Strategy: Deploy UEBA pilot and define high-risk behavioral analytics use cases.

Risk Description: Incident response communications are inconsistent across regions.
Mitigation Strategy: Standardize communications playbooks and train regional crisis teams.

Risk Description: Business services not fully mapped to supporting technical assets.
Mitigation Strategy: Complete CMDB/service map integration for tier-1 and tier-2 services.

Risk Description: Detection content lags new attacker techniques.
Mitigation Strategy: Adopt monthly detection engineering sprint cycle and purple-team validation.
